headline: Assessing Southwest Airlines (LUV) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Southwest Airlines (LUV) is back in focus after recent share price pressure, with the stock showing losses over the past week, month, and past 3 months. That pullback is prompting fresh questions about valuation. See our latest analysis for Southwest Airlines. While the 1 day, 7 day and 30 day share price returns of 7.74%, 12.05% and 28.59% declines point to fading short term momentum, the 1 year total shareholder return of 27.06% and 3 year total shareholder return of 35.31% highlight a more...
